questionHtml: A Nigerian business pays US$14 000 every year to a consultant in the United States. Using the information in Table 2, calculate the increase in the cost of this payment, in naira, between 2018 and 2020.
markschemeHtml:
2018: 14 000 × 306.5 = 4 291 000

2020: 14 000 × 379.5 = 5 313 000

Increase = 5 313 000 – 4 291 000

Any valid working (either 2018 or 2020 is correct) is sufficient for [1].
 
= 1 022 000
 
An answer of 1 022 000 without any valid working is sufficient for [1].
